data.body: 535 patchset-2 Verified -1 = FLAKE in lean-core optionality job (LLM subcmds review_code/scan_spec not degrading gracefully w/o pydantic_ai). NOT mine: verified nothing in core imports rebar.attest (those are rebar.llm.plan_review.attest, different module) and importing rebar.attest loads zero LLM modules; patchset-1 passed the same job; patchset-2 is docs-only. Posted recheck on 535.
